projectDescription: A CLI fork of Claude Code that lets you use any LLM — OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Ollama, and 200+ models — via an OpenAI-compatible API shim.
keyFeatures: OpenAI-compatible API shim that translates Anthropic SDK calls to any LLM provider
Support for 200+ models via OpenAI, Ollama, DeepSeek, Gemini, Codex, LM Studio, Together AI, Groq, Mistral, Azure OpenAI, and GitHub Models
Provider profiles system for saving and switching between provider configurations
Smart router with latency/cost/health-based automatic provider selection and fallback
Runtime diagnostics (doctor:runtime) with JSON output for CI/CD
Full tool support: Bash, FileRead, FileWrite, FileEdit, Glob, Grep, WebFetch, WebSearch, Agent, MCP, LSP, Tasks
Firecrawl integration for web search and JS-rendered page fetching across all providers
VS Code extension with OpenClaude Terminal Black theme
publicApiSurface: CLAUDE_CODE_USE_OPENAI=1 (env var to enable OpenAI provider)
OPENAI_BASE_URL (env var for custom API endpoint)
CODEX_API_KEY (env var for Codex backend auth)
FIRECRAWL_API_KEY (env var for web search/fetch via Firecrawl)
SmartRouter (Python class for intelligent provider routing)
